creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #33)

> Time to commit?

I've posted the last patch in the review on July 17th, according to the rules I have to wait for the timeout, which will happen on August 1st. At that point I'll evaluate committing without explicit vbox@FreeBSD.org approval.

That unless someone from vbox or portmgr or ports-secteam approves.

I'm going to post the patch here for completeness too.
